niche: WorthScan used electric scooter resale valuation

source_inputs.label: Operator brief
source_inputs.value: Create a five-slide WorthScan package for a used electric scooter with unknown battery history.

source_inputs.label: Valuation method
source_inputs.value: Compare model, mileage, battery health clues, charger inclusion, tire/brake condition, folding mechanism, and three local scooter comps.

source_inputs.label: Research boundary
source_inputs.value: Use reviewed manual examples only. No TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, or Creative Center scraping.

trend_examples.hook: This cheap scooter could hide a battery bill
trend_examples.notes: The hidden-cost hook fits repair-risk resale content.

trend_examples.hook: Ask this before buying a used scooter
trend_examples.notes: Question hook leads into checklist slides.
Comp reveal supports a range instead of a single price.

notes: No browser actions, provider calls, scraping, or social publishing.
Manual metrics are recorded after manual posts.

slides.on_screen_text: Scan this scooter before battery risk eats the deal
slides.visual_direction: Show scooter listing, price, and charger status if visible.

slides.on_screen_text: Find model, mileage, charger, and battery clues
slides.visual_direction: Crop model label, display, charger, and tire/brake closeups.
Show comp cards with model, range claims, condition, and price.

slides.on_screen_text: Subtract battery, tire, brake, and charger risk
slides.visual_direction: Use a red risk bar for missing charger or weak battery evidence.

slides.on_screen_text: Worth range: negotiate hard or pass
slides.visual_direction: Show range, confidence, and viewer comment prompt.

output_requirements.caption: Used scooter deal or battery trap? Comment "scan" with the next listing. WorthScan is an estimate, not a guarantee.
output_requirements.spoken_script: A cheap used scooter can become expensive if the battery or charger is questionable. Start with the model, mileage, charger, tires, and brakes, compare three local scooters, then subtract the risk before calling it a buy or pass.
posting_notes: Use only approved item photos or listing screenshots.
Do not imply battery testing unless a human performed it.
Use a range and confidence level, not an exact appraisal.

qa_notes: Battery and range claims require source evidence.
No social publishing is allowed by default.
